State permit page 8 live-data supported

California permit pages

California currently has 26 covered jurisdictions in the PermitPulse catalog. 8 have live-data support, 18 are portal-only, and the current platform mix includes Accela (8), eTRAKiT (3), Citizen Access (1).

Open Mission Control Browse all states
26 Covered jurisdictions
8 Live data
18 Portal-only
Covered jurisdictions

California city and county permit pages

These pages are generated directly from current jurisdiction metadata. Each one includes the official permit portal, platform label, current support level, and Mission Control path.

Portal-only

Alameda

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official Accela Citizen Access portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Anaheim

Online Services · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Anaheim's official online services page for permit research, plan review status, and permit-related self-service tools.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Bakersfield

Online Permit Application and Status · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Bakersfield's official online permit application and status page for permit lookup and submission routing.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Belmont

eTRAKiT · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Public search is available via the official eTRAKiT page.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

Beverly Hills

Community Development Portal · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official Beverly Hills portal for permit applications, plan review, and project lookup.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Contra Costa County

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official ePermits Center.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

Culver City

Accela · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official Culver City Accela portal for permit applications, history lookup, and inspections.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Fresno

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official Fresno Accela Citizen Access portal for planning and building records.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Irvine

Permits and Inspections · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Irvine's official permits and inspections portal for permit inquiry, plan check inquiry, and inspection requests.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

LA County (EPIC-LA Case History)

EPIC-LA · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Search via official LA County permit portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Lodi

eTRAKiT · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official eTRAKiT online permitting page.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

Los Angeles

LADBS · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official LADBS building records portal for permit lookup, status checks, and property research.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Oakland

Online Permit Center · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Oakland's official One-Stop Permit Center page to route into the Online Permit Center for permit lookup and applications.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Ontario

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official Citizen Access portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

Pasadena

Open Data (ArcGIS) · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official Pasadena permit portal for address and permit lookup. PermitPulse also queries the city's public permit activity feed for live activity and history context, but valuation, issued date, and reliable status fields are not published.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Riverside

POSSE · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official public permit portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Sacramento

Permit Services · Official portal fallback.

Official Sacramento permit services page with access to the public permit portal. PermitPulse inspected the city's current-year ArcGIS permit tables on 2026-04-19, but the latest raw Status_Date observed was 2026-03-22, so the live API connector is deferred until the official data looks current again.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Sacramento County

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official Accela Citizen Access portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

San Bernardino County

EZOP · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official EZOP portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

San Diego County

Accela · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official Accela Citizen Access portal fallback for record lookup.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

San Francisco

DBI Permit Tracking · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official San Francisco DBI permit tracking portal for permit and address research.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

San Jose

SJPermits · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official San Jose permit portal for source confirmation, applications, and workflow steps. PermitPulse also supports the city's official active permit dataset for recent activity, address research, and radar visibility.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Santa Clara County

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official public permit portal.

Open permit page Official portal
Live data supported

Santa Monica

Citizen Access · Official public permit dataset connected.

Official Santa Monica Citizen Access portal for applications, inspections, and direct source verification. PermitPulse also queries the city's public permit activity feed for live activity, valuation, address-level history context, and radar visibility, plus a separate demolition-watch feed for under-review demolition records. Coverage note: older demolition applications can still appear active due to prior city software limitations, so verify age-sensitive demo status directly with the city.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Solana Beach

eTRAKiT · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official building services page for eTRAKiT access details.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Stockton

Permit Center · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Stockton's official Community Development permit center route for project planning, permit guidance, and application intake.

Open permit page Official portal
All covered cities

Alameda Anaheim Bakersfield Belmont Beverly Hills Contra Costa County Culver City Fresno Irvine LA County (EPIC-LA Case History) Lodi Los Angeles Oakland Ontario Pasadena Riverside Sacramento Sacramento County San Bernardino County San Diego County San Francisco San Jose Santa Clara County Santa Monica Solana Beach Stockton
Coverage grouping

Current catalog split

This state page is generated from current catalog metadata only. Use the grouped links below to move between live-data-supported and portal-only coverage without leaving the canonical directory layer.

Live data supported: Beverly Hills, Culver City, Los Angeles, Pasadena, San Diego County, San Francisco, San Jose, Santa Monica

Portal-only: Alameda, Anaheim, Bakersfield, Belmont, Contra Costa County, Fresno, Irvine, LA County (EPIC-LA Case History), Lodi, Oakland, Ontario, Riverside, Sacramento, Sacramento County, San Bernardino County, Santa Clara County, Solana Beach, Stockton

PermitPulse

Designed in Los Angeles. Built for trades, diligence teams, and owners who need permit clarity before they commit.
